calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR APPOINTMENT OF SUCCESSOR TRUSTEE
Off Calendar Jan-23-2023 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR APPOINTMENT OF SUCCESSOR TRUSTEE
Off Calendar Dec-28-2022 Continued To Jan-23-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order (I)Approving Appointment Of Successor Co-Trustee, (Ii)Approving Trustee Successio
Off Calendar Jul-16-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Christopher Carin, via ZOOM, for Judith Cohen, via ZOOM, Beneficiary, Andrew Cohen, Beneficiary and Yvonne Goddard, Trustee; Collin Kelley, Guardian Ad Litem.

The court begins by advising counsel that it seems clear that the settlor's intent was to have a unitary fiduciary. Mr. Carin then offers oral argument to support the petition before the court. The court advises Mr. Carin that the court sees this petition as a trust amendment which the court is not comfortable granting. Mr. Carin again offers oral argument to support the petition including the request for individual separate share trusts. The court advises Mr. Carin that it is inclined to only grant relief regarding confirmation of ownership of trust property. Mr. Kelly advises that his primary concern for his clients is someone acting as Trustee.

The Petition for Order Approving Appointment of Successor Co-Trustees, etc., is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Balmy. Not reported.
